---
title: "Yixin Cao"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:yixincao615@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/yixin-cao-874bb3294
---

Welcome to my website!

Welcome to my website!

I am Yixin Cao, a Business Analytics student at the University of California, San Diego (UCSD), with a strong interest in data analysis and problem solving. I enjoy using quantitative methods to turn raw data into meaningful insights that support business decisions.

My academic experience has equipped me with skills in Python, SQL, Excel, and data visualization tools such as Tableau and Power BI. I have worked on projects involving exploratory data analysis, predictive modeling, and real-world business applications.

I am particularly interested in customer analytics, forecasting, and applying data-driven approaches to improve operational and strategic outcomes. Currently, I am focusing on building projects that combine analytics with practical business use cases.
